judge_reason: Description A details specific ink stamps and handwritten annotations (purple 'IMMEDIATE' stamp, circular date stamp '25 MAR 1945', red '56A', blue '90'), while Description B claims the page contains only typed text with no mention of these visual stamps, contradicting the visual content.
original_image_tags: A faded purple ink stamp with text "IMMEDIATE" angled upward.
A circular date stamp, partially legible: "25 MAR 1945". Inside, handwritten in red ink: "56A". To the right, handwritten in blue ink: "90".
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Scanned cover page of a typed military telegram with punched file holes, a small printed “AIR STAFF DISTRIBUTION” box with check marks, and handwritten red/black annotations including circled “56A” and “55A.”*
